---
title: "Week 01: Toolkit setup"
---

## Introduction

Coming soon!

## Recommended readings

- [Python tutorial](https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/) - Official Python documentation

## Lectures

- [**Slides: Introduction & development toolkit**](../slides/IS4010_W01_Introduction.qmd)

## Lab assignment

- [Lab 01: Toolkit setup](https://github.com/bgreenwell/is4010-course)
